front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Shadow Lord — the 3rd advancement of the Shadow Weaver class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: ultimate Shadow Weaver with shadow crystal armor (semi-transparent materializing and dematerializing), crown-shaped hood, shadow weapons freely manifested (sword/bow/chains switching), pure black (#0A0A0A) and red eyes (#FF0000) added, shadow pool always expanded beneath feet, 2-4 shadow tendrils floating around body. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
